title: Cozy Student Apartment Ano Poli: Private 1-Bed Flat

about.summary: Cozy student apartment Ano Poli: This fully equipped one-bedroom apartment in Thessaloniki is located on Kleious Street in the city centre near Ano Poli. It offers comfort, privacy, and easy access to Aristotle University and daily student life.

sections.title: 🏠 Cozy student apartment Ano Poli
sections.content: This cozy student apartment Ano Poli is available as an entire private home and is set up for practical everyday living. It is a move-in-ready option for students, Erasmus students, digital nomads and remote workers looking for a private base in Thessaloniki.
highlights: Accommodation: This cozy student apartment Ano Poli is a 35m² one-bedroom flat with a comfortable private living setup.
Fully equipped: Wi-Fi, air conditioning and the essentials needed for a comfortable stay are available.
For one student: A practical option for 1 student looking for private student housing in Thessaloniki.

sections.title: 📍 Location near Ano Poli & Tsinari
sections.content: Living here means staying in the historical centre of Thessaloniki, close to Ano Poli, Tsinari and the main commercial centre.
highlights: University access: Aristotle University is approximately 1.2 km away, making daily student life easier.
City College: City College is within walking distance, especially convenient for students in the city centre.
Historic spots: Around 5 minutes from Agios Dimitrios Church, 10 minutes from Aristotelous Square and 14 minutes from Rotunda and the Arch of Galerius.
Daily needs: Supermarket, bakery, marketplace, tavern, cafe, restaurant and bus station are around 50 meters away.
City access: The commercial centre is about 5-10 minutes away on foot, so daily bus use is not necessary.

sections.title: 🎓 Ideal for Erasmus Students & Digital Nomads
sections.content:
This apartment is ideal for students looking for private Student Housing in Thessaloniki, especially Aristotle University students, City College students and Erasmus students. It is also suitable for digital nomads and remote workers. For official university info, visit Aristotle University and City College.

To compare other properties in the building, view our student housing Ano Poli.

sections.title: Bills & Services
sections.content: Maintenance, water bill and Wi-Fi are included. Electricity is paid separately. We will be happy to welcome you in Thessaloniki and host you in this studio. For more info, you may reach out through the contact host button.

house_rules.additional_rules_info: Playing musical instruments: negotiable. Not suitable for couples. Tenant type: students and working professionals. Age and gender: no preference.

seo.seo_title: Cozy Student Apartment Ano Poli: Private 1-Bed Flat
seo.seo_description: Cozy student apartment Ano Poli ideal for Erasmus students. This 1-bed base is near Aristotle University, perfect for digital nomads.
